recommendations.title: The Legendary Giulia and Other Miracles

recommendations.title: Breaking Up in Rome
recommendations.overview: Aspiring writer Tommaso makes a living by penning the self-help column of a women's magazine. One day he receives a letter from a reader asking for advice on how to break up with her man: it is none other than Zoe, his partner of ten years, unaware o

recommendations.title: The Worst Days
recommendations.overview: Four episodes – Christmas, May 1st (Labour Day), August 15th (Ferragosto), Halloween – to tell four stories that delve into the human soul.

recommendations.title: Out of the Blue
recommendations.overview: Andrea is a handsome and cocky 38-year old man with a successful business career. Shallow, womanizing and a confirmed bachelor, his life seems to be just perfect... until the day he comes home and finds there Layla, a teenage girl who claims to be hi

recommendations.title: The Best Days
recommendations.overview: A quartet of stories unfold across four holidays as family members, friends and colleagues face hard decisions, career setbacks and life-changing events.

recommendations.title: Mia
recommendations.overview: The story of a small, simple and happy family in which a boy, a manipulator, violently enters, which distorts the life of this wonderful fifteen-year-old and makes her a nightmare.

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want
recommendations.overview: A university researcher is fired because of the cuts to university. To earn a living he decides to produce drugs recruiting his former colleagues, who despite their skills are living at the margins of society.

recommendations.title: Your Eyes Tell
recommendations.overview: A tragic accident lead to Akari's blindness, but she clings to life and the smaller pleasures it can still afford her. She meets Rui and begins to talk to him. Rui was once a promising kickboxer, but something happened in his past. Akari's smile brin

recommendations.title: The Man Who Copied
recommendations.overview: A young photocopier operator becomes infatuated with his neighbor and, unable to afford anything from her shop, turns to shady schemes to make money.

recommendations.title: Ti ricordi di me?
